merged_dimensions.name: HUD 布局位置
merged_dimensions.description: 确定 HUD 元素在屏幕上的安放位置。考虑四边角落布局，确保 28 个棋盘格子在主相机下完整可见，同时保持视觉平衡。建议顶部角落（不遮挡棋盘上部）或屏幕侧边。

merged_dimensions.name: 信息分组与层级
merged_dimensions.description: 将 HUD 信息按逻辑分组。当前玩家信息（名称+现金）可捆绑显示，轮次信息独立。视觉上通过间距、边框或背景色区分组别，降低认知负担。多玩家信息需在空间上均衡分布以保证对称性。

merged_dimensions.name: 当前玩家标识
merged_dimensions.description: 明确标识当前操作玩家。可通过高亮边框、颜色标记或「当前」标签实现。在多玩家本地游戏中，视觉标识应让所有玩家一眼识别轮到谁，避免混淆。需与玩家棋子颜色/编号保持一致。

merged_dimensions.name: 现金显示格式
merged_dimensions.description: player_cash 的呈现方式。可选择数字+货币符号、图标式金额条、动态数字动画（如滚动递增/递减效果）。需考虑大数字显示的紧凑性，以及金额变化时的视觉反馈强度。

merged_dimensions.name: 轮次信息可见性
merged_dimensions.description: turn_number 的视觉权重。可作为次要信息（较小字体、柔和色调）或重要进度指示（突出显示）。位置可放在 HUD 边缘或中心。需确保玩家随时知道当前游戏阶段。

merged_dimensions.name: 多玩家信息对称性
merged_dimensions.description: 在 2-4 名玩家模式下，确保所有玩家信息的视觉权重和位置均衡。避免任何玩家获得「中心」或「更显眼」的位置。屏幕空间应公平分配给各玩家信息区。

merged_dimensions.name: 玩家颜色编码
merged_dimensions.description: HUD 中玩家标识的颜色系统。需与棋盘上玩家棋子颜色对应，建立认知关联。考虑色盲友好设计：不仅依赖颜色，可加入形状、编号或图案区分。2-4 色需高对比度可区分。

merged_dimensions.name: 透明度与不透明度
merged_dimensions.description: HUD 背景的透明度设置。高透明度减少视觉遮挡但降低可读性；完全不透明提高可读性但可能遮挡棋盘。需在遮挡性与可读性之间取得平衡，建议 70-90% 不透明度或使用模糊背景。

merged_dimensions.name: Z轴层级控制
merged_dimensions.description: HUD 与弹窗的层级关系。HUD 应处于棋盘之上、弹窗之下，确保购买/租金/监狱弹窗出现时不会被遮挡。设定明确的 Z-index 优先级规则，保证 UI 层级清晰。

merged_dimensions.name: 可折叠/最小化选项
merged_dimensions.description: 提供玩家隐藏 HUD 的选项。在关键时刻（如查看完整棋盘或拍照）可收起 HUD，保留最小状态指示器。折叠/展开应有平滑过渡动画，不干扰游戏流程。

merged_dimensions.name: 无障碍文字缩放
merged_dimensions.description: 支持系统文字缩放设置。HUD 文字应在用户放大文字时保持可读，不溢出边界或被裁剪。考虑字号上限与下限，确保关键信息始终可见。图标应随文字等比缩放。

merged_dimensions.name: 高对比度模式
merged_dimensions.description: 提供高对比度/暗色模式选项，适应不同光照环境和视力需求。确保 HUD 在明亮或昏暗环境中都有足够可读性。对比度比值应符合 WCAG AA 标准。

merged_dimensions.name: 状态变化动画反馈
merged_dimensions.description: 现金变化、轮次切换时的动画效果。现金减少可用红色闪烁，减少用绿色+上箭头。轮次切换可使用淡入淡出或滑入动画。动画应简短（200-400ms）避免延迟感。

merged_dimensions.name: 响应式适配
merged_dimensions.description: 适应不同屏幕尺寸和比例。横屏/竖屏模式下的布局调整。小屏幕设备上 HUD 元素的压缩策略。保持核心信息完整性，牺牲非关键装饰元素。

merged_dimensions.name: 关键信息峰值提示
merged_dimensions.description: 重要变化时的临时突出显示。当现金骤变、轮到玩家时，HUD 可短暂放大或加亮该信息区域，2-3 秒后恢复正常状态。避免持续干扰，同时确保玩家注意到关键变化。

merged_dimensions.name: 数据绑定策略
merged_dimensions.description: HUD 三个字段的数据源绑定。current_player（玩家标识/颜色）绑定 gameplay 状态机的 active_player 引用；player_cash 绑定当前玩家现金字段；turn_number 绑定游戏回合计数。只读展示，不持有状态。

merged_dimensions.name: 刷新触发时机
merged_dimensions.description: HUD 数据更新频率。推荐在以下事件触发刷新：回合切换（turn_number +1、current_player 切换）、现金变动（购买/租金交易后）、玩家状态变化（入狱/破产）。避免每帧轮询。

merged_dimensions.name: 多玩家指示器
merged_dimensions.description: 2-4 名本地玩家时，HUD 如何区分当前玩家。建议使用玩家颜色/头像图标在 current_player 字段左侧标识，让其他玩家一目了然知晓当前回合归属。

merged_dimensions.name: 弹窗避让机制
merged_dimensions.description: 当购买弹窗、租金弹窗、监狱选项弹窗触发时，HUD 需 Z-order 低于弹窗，且在屏幕空间上不与之重叠。可采用：HUD 收窄宽度、移至屏幕更边缘、或弹窗激活时 HUD 透明度降低。

merged_dimensions.name: 视觉层级
merged_dimensions.description: HUD 在 Canvas/Scene 层级中的 Z 值。必须低于弹窗 UI，高于棋盘格子背景（但不遮挡格子视角）。推荐使用专属 UI Layer，设置 render queue 保证可读性。

merged_dimensions.name: 响应式缩放
merged_dimensions.description: 在不同分辨率/宽高比下，HUD 元素如何自适应。建议使用锚点（Anchor）和相对布局，宽度占屏幕 80-90%，字号基于屏幕高度动态计算，保证 2-4 名玩家时文本不重叠。

merged_dimensions.name: 动画反馈
merged_dimensions.description: HUD 数据变更时的过渡动画。当 player_cash 减少（租金）时触发红色闪烁；增加（购买土地）时触发绿色高亮；turn_number 切换时数字滚动动画。动画时长建议 200-400ms。

merged_dimensions.name: 可访问性设计
merged_dimensions.description: HUD 文字对比度、字号最小值、颜色无障碍区分（current_player 颜色需对色盲友好）。支持 UI 懒加载预制体，运行时可切换皮肤主题。

merged_dimensions.name: HUD 布局分区策略
merged_dimensions.description: 将屏幕划分为非冲突区域：顶部信息栏（玩家/现金/回合）、底部/侧边次要操作区，确保不遮挡棋盘中心和弹窗叠加层

merged_dimensions.name: 视觉边界设计
merged_dimensions.description: HUD 元素需有明确的视觉收束区域，与棋盘格子形成自然分界，避免视觉渗透导致棋盘完整性受损

merged_dimensions.name: Monopoly 品牌视觉一致性
merged_dimensions.description: HUD 需延续大富翁经典色系（深绿/金色/暖白），使用符合经典字体的排版，强化品牌识别度

merged_dimensions.name: 多玩家状态可见性
merged_dimensions.description: 2-4人本地时，各玩家信息需在 HUD 中并置展示，通过图标/颜色区分，避免视线在多名玩家信息间频繁跳转

merged_dimensions.name: 棋盘可见边界维护
merged_dimensions.description: HUD 边缘留出安全缓冲区，确保28格棋盘在主相机视角下四角完整可见，不被 HUD 元素切割

merged_dimensions.name: 弹窗非介入设计
merged_dimensions.description: HUD 布局需预设 z-index 层叠关系，确保购买/租金/监狱弹窗出现时自动避让或 HUD 元素隐式降权

merged_dimensions.name: 美术风格主题
merged_dimensions.description: 定义 HUD 整体美术方向：经典复古（深木纹材质/金属质感）VS 现代简约（扁平化/几何线条），需与棋盘视觉语言统一

merged_dimensions.name: 玩家颜色编码
merged_dimensions.description: 为2-4名玩家分配高辨识度色码（红/蓝/绿/黄），HUD 中玩家头像/标识需与棋盘上棋子颜色一致

merged_dimensions.name: 动态反馈设计
merged_dimensions.description: 玩家现金变动、回合切换时的微动画设计，在不干扰核心棋局的前提下提供视觉反馈

merged_dimensions.name: 透明度衰减策略
merged_dimensions.description: HUD 边缘区域可适度透明化，减少对棋盘的视觉侵入，同时保持核心信息区域完全不透明

merged_dimensions.name: 字体层级与比例
merged_dimensions.description: 协调 HUD 内各字段字号：current_player 需醒目（主标题级）、player_cash 中等（数据展示级）、turn_number 较小（状态指示级）

merged_dimensions.name: 图标风格一致性
merged_dimensions.description: HUD 中使用的图标（玩家头像、现金符号等）需统一线宽/填充风格，与棋盘上的地产图标视觉语言对齐

ux-designer.hud.layout_position: Top horizontal bar anchored to the top edge
ux-designer.hud.information_grouping: Group by player status (current player name, cash, turn number) within a single compact card; secondary players shown as smaller cards in a row
ux-designer.hud.current_player_indicator: Color‑coded border + animated highlight plus a player icon next to the name
ux-designer.hud.cash_display_format: Numeric value with thousand separators and a currency symbol, e.g., '$1,250'
ux-designer.hud.turn_number_visibility: Visible as ‘Turn X’ label adjacent to the current player card
ux-designer.hud.multi_player_symmetry: All player panels displayed simultaneously in a horizontal row, each showing name and cash, with the active player highlighted
ux-designer.hud.player_color_coding: Each player panel tinted with the player’s token color (e.g., red, blue, green, yellow)
ux-designer.hud.transparency_opacity: Background at 70% opacity, text fully opaque
ux-designer.hud.z_index_layering: HUD at z‑index 100; pop‑ups (purchase, rent, prison) at z‑index 200
ux-designer.hud.collapsibility: Auto‑collapse after 5 seconds of inactivity, re‑appear on any input
ux-designer.hud.accessibility_scaling: Default base size 16 px with optional scaling up to 200% via system accessibility settings
ux-designer.hud.contrast_mode: High‑contrast mode: dark background with bright text; default mode uses dark semi‑transparent bar with light text
ux-designer.hud.feedback_animations: Cash change triggers a brief count‑up/down animation and a subtle pulse on the cash label
ux-designer.hud.responsive_adaptation: Horizontal layout scales down on narrow screens; on very small devices the HUD switches to a compact vertical stack
ux-designer.hud.notification_peak: When a rent or purchase popup is triggered, the relevant HUD element glows briefly to draw attention
ux-designer.hud.data_binding: Real‑time binding to game state variables (currentPlayer, playerCash, turnNumber)
ux-designer.hud.refresh_trigger: Event‑driven refresh on relevant state changes (cash change, turn advance, player swap)
ux-designer.hud.multiplayer_indicator: Row of player avatars/names with a small colored dot indicating the active player
ux-designer.hud.popup_avoidance: HUD positioned at the top edge; popups are centered with a margin so they never overlap the HUD bar
ux-designer.hud.visual_hierarchy: Primary: current player card (largest, highlighted); Secondary: other player cards (smaller, muted); Tertiary: turn number label (small, right‑aligned)
ux-designer.hud.responsive_scale: Layout uses percentage‑based widths and font sizes relative to viewport
ux-designer.hud.animation_feedback: Same as feedback animations: count‑up/down on cash change, subtle scale pulse on highlight change
ux-designer.hud.accessibility: Full screen‑reader labels, focus indicators, and keyboard navigation support for all HUD elements
ux-designer.hud.layout_zones: Top zone for HUD, central zone for board (28 squares), bottom zone for controls (dice, end turn)
ux-designer.hud.visual_containment: HUD confined within a single rectangular bar that does not extend beyond the screen edges
ux-designer.hud.monopoly_identity: Use classic Monopoly color palette (green, gold, deep red) with a subtle board‑style border
ux-designer.hud.multiplayer_visibility: All 2‑4 players visible simultaneously in the HUD row
ux-designer.hud.board_visibility_boundary: HUD height limited to ≤5% of the viewport, ensuring no board square is covered
ux-designer.hud.popup_noninterference: HUD placed at the top with low z‑index, popups centered at higher z‑index
ux-designer.hud.aesthetic_theme: Clean, flat design with subtle shadows and the classic Monopoly green/gold accent colors
ux-designer.hud.color_coding: Each player assigned a unique color (e.g., red, blue, green, yellow) used consistently in their HUD panel and on the board token
ux-designer.hud.motion_responsiveness: Animations complete within 150 ms, with easing for smooth transitions
ux-designer.hud.opacity_attenuation: Inactive player panels operate at 60% opacity, current player panel at 100% opacity
ux-designer.hud.typography_scale: Base font 16 px for primary info, 14 px for secondary, with support for scaling up to 200%
ux-designer.hud.iconography_consistency: All icons use a uniform outlined style: cash (banknote), player (silhouette), turn (circular arrow)

ui-programmer.hud.refresh_trigger: on turn change and cash transaction
ui-programmer.hud.opacity_attenuation: fade to 50% opacity on overlapping board

art-director.hud.layout_position: Top-edge anchored, centered horizontal strip with corner extensions
art-director.hud.information_grouping: Vertical stack per player: [Avatar] [Name] [Cash] stacked within horizontal row
art-director.hud.current_player_indicator: Glowing border + elevated z-index + pulsing animation on active player's card
art-director.hud.turn_number_visibility: Subtle badge in top-right corner outside main HUD strip
art-director.hud.multi_player_symmetry: Equal-width player cards in horizontal row, centered
art-director.hud.player_color_coding: Left border stripe in player's assigned color (6px) + color-matched avatar icon
art-director.hud.transparency_opacity: Player cards: 85% opaque background; active player card: 100% opaque; HUD container: 70% opaque
art-director.hud.z_index_layering: Layer 1 (bottom): Board. Layer 2: HUD strip. Layer 3: Popups. Layer 4: System notifications
art-director.hud.accessibility_scaling: HUD scales 1x–1.5x via pinch; minimum touch target 48px for interactive elements
art-director.hud.contrast_mode: High-contrast default (dark text on semi-transparent light panel); optional dark mode with inverted contrast
art-director.hud.feedback_animations: Cash value: count-up/down animation (400ms) on change; active player: subtle breathing glow (2s cycle); turn transition: slide-in indicator
art-director.hud.responsive_adaptation: HUD compresses horizontally (reduced padding) before reducing player card size; below 480px width: 2-row vertical stack
art-director.hud.notification_peak: Badge appears above affected player's card; auto-dismisses after 3s or on acknowledgment
art-director.hud.data_binding: Cash values bound to game state model; updates propagate within single frame via reactive binding
art-director.hud.refresh_trigger: Event-driven: onTurnChange, onTransaction, onPropertyAction; not polling-based
art-director.hud.multiplayer_indicator: All 2–4 players visible simultaneously in HUD; turn order indicated by left-to-right sequence with active highlight
art-director.hud.popup_avoidance: HUD occupies top 12% of screen; all popups constrained to center 76% horizontal band and bottom 60% vertical
art-director.hud.visual_hierarchy: Tier 1 (largest, full opacity): Current player name + cash. Tier 2 (medium): Other players' names + cash. Tier 3 (small): Turn number, game mode icons.
art-director.hud.responsive_scale: HUD elements scale proportionally with viewport; font scales from 14px (mobile) to 18px (tablet) to 22px (desktop)
art-director.hud.animation_feedback: State transitions: 200ms ease-out; cash changes: 400ms with easing overshoot; player highlight: continuous 2s sine wave
art-director.hud.accessibility: Font: Inter or system-ui; minimum 16sp for cash values; color-blind safe mode using shape + pattern instead of hue alone
art-director.hud.layout_zones: Zone A (top-left): Player 1 & 2 cards. Zone B (top-center): Active turn indicator. Zone C (top-right): Player 3 & 4 cards + turn number
art-director.hud.visual_containment: Each player card: rounded rectangle (8px radius) with subtle drop shadow (4px blur, 20% opacity)
art-director.hud.monopoly_identity: Fonts: Bahnschrift or similar condensed sans-serif for headers; color palette from classic board (deep blue, gold, cream); subtle board-inspired decorative elements
art-director.hud.multiplayer_visibility: All player cards always expanded (not collapsed) showing name + cash; player state icons (jail, bankrupt) overlay on card
art-director.hud.board_visibility_boundary: HUD stops 60px above board edge; board tiles remain fully visible including bottom row; no HUD element extends into board area
art-director.hud.popup_noninterference: HUD has lower z-index than all popup types; popup system queries HUD bounds before positioning; popups auto-reposition to avoid HUD overlap
art-director.hud.aesthetic_theme: Modernized classic Monopoly: clean lines, subtle gradients, matte surfaces; avoids skeuomorphic excess but retains brand warmth
art-director.hud.color_coding: Player colors: Red, Blue, Green, Yellow (classic assignment); HUD accent stripe matches player piece color; active state uses 20% brighter variant
art-director.hud.motion_responsiveness: Animations interruptible; rapid state changes collapse intermediate frames; no animation on critical-path actions (buy confirmation)
art-director.hud.opacity_attenuation: Background panels: 60–85% opacity based on information importance; text always 100% opacity; icons scale opacity 80–100% based on interaction state
art-director.hud.typography_scale: Player name: 16sp bold; Cash value: 20sp semibold; Turn number: 12sp regular; All caps for player names for consistency
art-director.hud.iconography_consistency: Custom icon set: flat, single-weight (2px stroke), rounded caps; size 20px for inline, 32px for standalone; monetary icon always precedes cash value

hud.layout_position.final_choice: Top-edge anchored centered horizontal strip with corner extensions
hud.layout_position.integration_note: UX Designer and Art Director align on horizontal bar; UI Programmer's 'top-left corner' is subsumed by the broader horizontal strip that spans the top.

hud.information_grouping.final_choice: Player-centric grouping with vertical stack per player [Avatar][Name][Cash] displayed in horizontal row
hud.information_grouping.integration_note: All three agree on player-centric grouping. UX Designer and Art Director both describe vertical stacks within horizontal layout; UI Programmer's 'player-centric' is the semantic intent.

hud.current_player_indicator.integration_note: UX Designer (color-coded border + animation + icon), UI Programmer (colored badge), and Art Director (glowing border + z-elevation + pulsing) all converge on color + animation for active player indication.

hud.cash_display_format.integration_note: UX Designer and UI Programmer agree on currency symbol with separators. Art Director adds icon prefix which is decorative and optional; core format is shared.

hud.turn_number_visibility.final_choice: Always visible, positioned adjacent to current player card or top-right corner
hud.turn_number_visibility.integration_note: All agree turn number must be visible. UX Designer positions it adjacent to player card; Art Director places it top-right; UI Programmer says 'always visible'. Unified as always visible with placement flexible.

hud.multi_player_symmetry.final_choice: All player panels displayed simultaneously in horizontal row with identical layouts
hud.multi_player_symmetry.integration_note: UX Designer and Art Director both describe horizontal row of equal-width cards; UI Programmer's 'identical layout' reinforces the symmetry requirement.

hud.player_color_coding.final_choice: Each player assigned unique color (Red, Blue, Green, Yellow) with left border stripe and color-matched avatar on HUD panel
hud.player_color_coding.integration_note: UX Designer emphasizes tinted background; Art Director specifies left border stripe + avatar. Both implement player-specific colors consistently. Merged into border stripe + avatar approach.

hud.transparency_opacity.final_choice: HUD container at 70% opacity; active player card at 100%; inactive player cards at 60-85%
hud.transparency_opacity.integration_note: UX Designer (70%), UI Programmer (75%), Art Director (70% container, 85% cards, 100% active). All within acceptable range; Art Director's graduated opacity adds useful nuance.

hud.z_index_layering.integration_note: UX Designer provides numeric values (100/200); UI Programmer describes relative order; Art Director provides complete layer breakdown. All agree on HUD between board and popups.

hud.collapsibility.integration_note: UX Designer and UI Programmer advocate collapsible with toggle/auto-collapse. Art Director insists non-collapsible for constant information access. Art Director's requirement prevents HUD disappearing during critical gameplay moments. UNRESOLVED if Art Director's hard constraint cannot be relaxed.

hud.accessibility_scaling.final_choice: Base size 16sp with scaling 1x–1.5x via system settings or pinch; minimum 48px touch targets
hud.accessibility_scaling.integration_note: UX Designer proposes up to 200%; UI Programmer at 1.25x; Art Director at 1x–1.5x with 48px minimum touch targets. Art Director's cap and touch target requirement prioritizes usability over maximum scaling.

hud.contrast_mode.final_choice: High-contrast default (dark text on semi-transparent light panel); optional dark mode with inverted contrast
hud.contrast_mode.integration_note: UX Designer and UI Programmer specify high contrast; Art Director adds optional dark/inverted mode. Art Director's default matches others; additional mode is additive enhancement.

hud.feedback_animations.final_choice: Cash count-up/down animation on change; subtle pulse/scale on highlight change; slide-in for turn transitions
hud.feedback_animations.integration_note: UX Designer (count-up/down + pulse), UI Programmer (slide-in), Art Director (count-up/down 400ms + breathing glow 2s + slide-in). Combined into count-up/down cash animation + pulse + slide-in transition.

hud.responsive_adaptation.final_choice: Horizontal layout compresses (reduced padding first, then card size) before switching to 2-row vertical stack below 480px
hud.responsive_adaptation.integration_note: UX Designer and Art Director describe progressive degradation (padding → card size → vertical stack). UI Programmer's 'dynamic repositioning' is the implementation approach. Art Director's 480px breakpoint provides specific threshold.

hud.notification_peak.final_choice: Relevant HUD element glows briefly to draw attention
hud.notification_peak.integration_note: UX Designer (glow), UI Programmer (brief flash), Art Director (badge with 3s auto-dismiss). Brief glow is the common element across all three positions.

hud.data_binding.final_choice: Reactive data binding to game state model with single-frame update propagation
hud.data_binding.integration_note: UX Designer (real-time binding), UI Programmer (reactive data binding), Art Director (reactive binding within single frame). All three agree on reactive binding semantics.

hud.refresh_trigger.final_choice: Event-driven refresh on onTurnChange, onTransaction, onPropertyAction
hud.refresh_trigger.integration_note: UX Designer (state changes), UI Programmer (turn change + cash transaction), Art Director (explicit event names). All advocate event-driven over polling.

hud.multiplayer_indicator.final_choice: All 2-4 players visible simultaneously in HUD row with colored dot/highlight indicating active player
hud.multiplayer_indicator.integration_note: UX Designer (avatars + colored dot), UI Programmer (player list sidebar), Art Director (all visible + left-to-right sequence). UX Designer and Art Director converge on horizontal row with active highlight.

hud.popup_avoidance.final_choice: HUD positioned at top edge; popups constrained to center band and lower screen area with margins
hud.popup_avoidance.integration_note: UX Designer and Art Director both position HUD at top; UI Programmer's 'dynamic shift' is the mechanism. Art Director's specific positioning (top 12%, center 76% band, bottom 60%) provides implementation detail.

hud.visual_hierarchy.final_choice: Tier 1 (largest, highlighted): Current player name + cash; Tier 2 (medium): Other players; Tier 3 (small): Turn number
hud.visual_hierarchy.integration_note: All three explicitly define 3 tiers with current player most prominent, others secondary, turn number tertiary. Art Director's size specifications (largest/medium/small) align with UX Designer's description.

hud.responsive_scale.final_choice: Proportional scaling with viewport; font scales 14sp (mobile) to 18sp (tablet) to 22sp (desktop)
hud.responsive_scale.integration_note: UX Designer (percentage-based widths), UI Programmer (scale with viewport), Art Director (specific font sizes per device). All advocate proportional scaling; Art Director provides concrete breakpoints.

hud.animation_feedback.final_choice: 200ms ease-out for state transitions; 400ms count-up/down for cash changes; 2s breathing glow for player highlight
hud.animation_feedback.integration_note: UX Designer (150ms), UI Programmer (200ms), Art Director (200ms/400ms with overshoot). Art Director's timing specifications are most detailed and include cash-specific duration.

hud.accessibility.final_choice: Full screen-reader labels, ARIA tags, focus indicators, keyboard navigation; minimum 16sp for cash values; color-blind safe mode using shape + pattern
hud.accessibility.integration_note: UX Designer (screen-reader + focus + keyboard), UI Programmer (ARIA tags), Art Director (16sp minimum + color-blind safe mode). Combined into comprehensive accessibility support.

hud.layout_zones.final_choice: Top zone: HUD with player cards; Center zone: Board (28 squares); Bottom zone: Controls (dice, end turn); HUD split left-right for 4 players
hud.layout_zones.integration_note: UX Designer defines basic zones; UI Programmer suggests corner zones; Art Director provides detailed split (Players 1&2 left, Players 3&4 right, turn center). Art Director's zone breakdown is most complete.

hud.visual_containment.final_choice: Bounded rectangular container with 8px rounded corners and subtle drop shadow
hud.visual_containment.integration_note: UX Designer (rectangular bar within screen), UI Programmer (bounded container + rounded corners), Art Director (8px radius + 4px blur shadow). Merged into specific rounded rect with shadow.

hud.monopoly_identity.final_choice: Classic Monopoly color palette (deep blue, gold, cream, green) with Bahnschrift/similar condensed sans-serif; subtle board-inspired decorative elements
hud.monopoly_identity.integration_note: UX Designer (green, gold, deep red), UI Programmer (classic theme), Art Director (deep blue, gold, cream + specific font). Art Director's palette and font specifications are most detailed.

hud.multiplayer_visibility.final_choice: All 2-4 players visible simultaneously in HUD with expanded cards showing name + cash; state icons overlay on cards
hud.multiplayer_visibility.integration_note: UX Designer (all visible in row), UI Programmer (split panels), Art Director (always expanded + state icons). All three agree on full simultaneous visibility.

hud.board_visibility_boundary.final_choice: HUD height ≤5% of viewport, stopping at least 60px above board edge; all 28 squares fully visible
hud.board_visibility_boundary.integration_note: UX Designer (≤5%), UI Programmer (2px margin), Art Director (60px stop). Art Director's 60px specification effectively satisfies ≤5% requirement and matches GDD's 28-square visibility constraint.

hud.popup_noninterference.final_choice: HUD at lower z-index than all popups; popup system queries HUD bounds and auto-repositions to avoid overlap
hud.popup_noninterference.integration_note: UX Designer (low z-index + margin), UI Programmer (HUD below overlay priority), Art Director (auto-reposition). All three agree HUD must not interfere with popups.

hud.aesthetic_theme.final_choice: Clean flat modern design with subtle shadows and gradients; uses classic Monopoly color palette; retains brand warmth without skeuomorphic excess
hud.aesthetic_theme.integration_note: UX Designer (clean flat + subtle shadows), UI Programmer (flat modern + subtle gradients), Art Director (modernized classic + matte surfaces). All converge on flat modern with brand colors.

hud.color_coding.final_choice: Red, Blue, Green, Yellow (classic assignment); HUD accent stripe matches player token color; active state uses brighter variant
hud.color_coding.integration_note: All three specify Red/Blue/Green/Yellow. UX Designer and Art Director use same token colors; UI Programmer's 'player-specific colors' is less specific but compatible.

hud.motion_responsiveness.final_choice: Smooth 150-200ms transitions with easing; animations interruptible; no animation on critical-path actions (buy confirmation)
hud.motion_responsiveness.integration_note: UX Designer (150ms), UI Programmer (200ms), Art Director (200ms + interruptible + no critical-path animation). Art Director's critical-path exclusion adds important constraint.

hud.opacity_attenuation.final_choice: Inactive panels 60-85% opacity based on importance; active player at 100%; text always 100% opaque
hud.opacity_attenuation.integration_note: UX Designer (60% inactive), UI Programmer (50% overlap), Art Director (60-85% based on importance). Art Director's graduated approach based on importance is most nuanced.

hud.typography_scale.final_choice: Player name 16sp bold; Cash 20sp semibold; Turn number 12sp regular; secondary elements at 85% scale; supports up to 1.5x scaling
hud.typography_scale.integration_note: UX Designer (16px/14px base), UI Programmer (1.0/0.85 ratio), Art Director (16sp/20sp/12sp specific). Art Director's specific size assignments are most actionable.

hud.iconography_consistency.final_choice: Uniform flat line icons with 2px stroke and rounded caps; 20px inline for cash (banknote), player (silhouette), turn (circular arrow); 32px for standalone
hud.iconography_consistency.integration_note: UX Designer (uniform outlined style), UI Programmer (unified line icons), Art Director (2px stroke, 20px/32px sizes). Art Director provides concrete specifications.

capability_gaps.integration_note: UX Designer and UI Programmer advocate collapsible with toggle/auto-collapse. Art Director insists non-collapsible for constant information access. Art Director's requirement prevents HUD disappearing during critical gameplay moments. UNRESOLVED if Art Director's hard constraint cannot be relaxed.

stances.ux-designer: Auto‑collapse after 5 seconds of inactivity, re‑appear on any input
